definition: The OpenType script/language tag lookup chain must be steered to produce a specific sentinel result (HB_SCRIPT_INVALID or HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_SCRIPT) by navigating a chain of multi-byte tag/subtag comparisons in hb_ot_old_tag_from_script; I2S substitutes the logged tag operand bytes to target the sentinel directly while VP's CMP_MAP gradient preserves partially-matching language subtag inputs as corpus, both being jointly necessary because the multi-comparison chain has too many bytes for single-shot substitution at every step, and the gradient alone cannot converge when the chain diverges far from the sentinel.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver script-vs-constant comparison operands and substitutes the matching bytes into the input to steer the script value to HB_SCRIPT_INVALID, which value_profile without I2S cannot achieve.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes operand bytes steering script value to HB_SCRIPT_INVALID

analysis.summary_one_line: Reach hb_ot_old_tag_from_script with an HB_SCRIPT_INVALID (sentinel) script after navigating multi-stage tag/language parsing, hitting the switch's default-script case.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font/tag input that drives the parsed script value to the HB_SCRIPT_INVALID sentinel (the switch operand at line 41 must equal the INVALID constant), reaching the case at line 43.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10; its winning seeds carry an I2S-floor (mutation_op = -) ancestor in lineage, indicating I2SRandReplace substituted the operand bytes that steer script to the INVALID/default-script comparison target.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, so it must blindly mutate the bytes feeding the script value; it resolves only 2/10 and stays blocked 8/10 with avg blocked duration 22.10h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: I2SRandReplace (cmplog input-to-state): the CmpLogObserver records the script-vs-constant comparison operands and the mutator substitutes the matching operand into the input, the technique value_profile lacks but value_profile_cmplog adds.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the HB_SCRIPT_INVALID case arm returning the default script tag inside a switch on the script value.
The switch operand is the script value, so reaching the INVALID arm requires the parsed script to equal the INVALID sentinel.
value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch 10/10 while value_profile resolves only 2/10 (loser, delta I2S).
value_profile lacks the I2SRandReplace mutator entirely.
I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer, matches one operand in the input, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile loser stays blocked with a long avg blocked duration of 22.10h.
value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 while cmplog resolves only 2/10 (loser, delta value_profile).
value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback preserves an input that produces a CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any seen before.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The path to the blocker traverses chained tag/language comparison functions including lang_matches.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: hb-ot-tag.cc:lang_matches(char const*, char const*, char const*, unsigned int)

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog loser stays blocked with avg blocked duration 19.90h.
The winning seeds are discovered by value_profile_cmplog.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the INVALID/default-script switch arm on a single exact-magic comparison where value_profile alone (no I2S) resolves it as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP gradient suffices and I2S is not required.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Whether the script value reaching the switch is governed by a single I2S-solvable magic comparison versus a multi-stage chain — the source shows the switch operand but not the dataflow that sets the INVALID sentinel.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient preserves intermediate inputs that advance chained lang/tag comparisons closer to matching, incrementally steering the script lookup to the INVALID sentinel that cmplog alone cannot reach.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP gradient climbs chained tag comparisons toward INVALID-script sentinel

analysis.summary_one_line: Reach hb_ot_old_tag_from_script with an HB_SCRIPT_INVALID (sentinel) script after navigating multi-stage tag/language parsing, hitting the switch's default-script case.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same INVALID-script reaching input, but arrived at by progressively closing the multi-byte distance on the chained tag/language comparisons (lang_matches, parse_private_use_subtag) that gate which script value is produced.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient feedback; it preserves intermediate inputs that get the chained tag comparisons closer to matching, so it resolves 10/10 where cmplog (no CMP_MAP) resolves only 2/10.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, so partial-progress inputs on the lang/tag comparison chain are not retained as corpus; cmplog stays blocked 8/10 with avg blocked duration 19.90h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile Hamming/prefix-distance feedback): new CMP_MAP buckets for closer-matching operand pairs preserve intermediate inputs, the technique cmplog lacks but value_profile_cmplog adds.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the HB_SCRIPT_INVALID case arm returning the default script tag inside a switch on the script value.
The switch operand is the script value, so reaching the INVALID arm requires the parsed script to equal the INVALID sentinel.
value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch 10/10 while value_profile resolves only 2/10 (loser, delta I2S).

evidence_trail.exact_quote: hb-ot-tag.cc:lang_matches(char const*, char const*, char const*, unsigned int)

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog loser stays blocked with avg blocked duration 19.90h.
The winning seeds are discovered by value_profile_cmplog.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the INVALID/default-script switch arm on a single exact-magic comparison where value_profile alone (no I2S) resolves it as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP gradient suffices and I2S is not required.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the logged 4-byte FOURCC operand at the matching table-directory offsets, planting recognized table tags that value_profile's blind havoc cannot synthesize.
signature.one_line: I2S plants recognized 4-byte FOURCC tag in table directory

analysis.summary_one_line: Reaching the false side needs a valid font/table structure plus a script-language subtag whose old-tag lookup returns the default script, requiring both I2S substitution and CMP_MAP gradient.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed font blob whose header/table-directory bytes (offsets 0x00-0x1f) carry recognized 4-byte table tags such as 'GSUB' / 'post' so the harness descends into hb_ot_tags_from_script_and_language and actually reaches the blocker at line 174.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry literal ASCII table tags at the head ('GSUB' at 0x0c-0x0f in seed 1/2, 'post' in seed 3/4), the exact 4-byte FOURCC magic an I2S CMP wants substituted; the dash-row ancestor in the lineage confirms an I2SRandReplace find planted such a tag.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so it cannot copy a CMP operand (a 4-byte FOURCC) verbatim into the table-directory offsets; its loser-blocking seeds (e.g. seed 1 'y-hant-hk') never form the recognized table tags and stall taking the true branch 8/10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes a logged 4-byte FOURCC operand at the matching input offsets, planting the exact table tag that value_profile's blind havoc cannot synthesize.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked false side is taken only when old_tag equals the default script tag at line 174.
value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 while value_profile blocks 8/10, the I2S-delta pair.
value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog on the value_profile delta.
Winner-resolving seeds carry literal table tags GSUB and post at the head of the blob.
A winner-resolving seed carries the post table tag.
Winner-resolving seeds carry language-like subtags refined into the tail.
A loser-blocking seed carries an unrelated language tag y-hant-hk and never forms recognized table tags.
cmplog and vpc have I2SRandReplace; value_profile does not.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile's CMP_MAP rewards inputs whose operands are closer to matching, preserving gradient stepping stones.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog lacks the CMP_MAP gradient bucket signal that value_profile adds.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where value_profile alone (no I2SRandReplace) resolves the false branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing the exact-FOURCC-tag substitution axis is not necessary.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The split of credit between the I2S FOURCC-tag axis and the VP language-subtag gradient axis is inferred from seed content; the byte-diff offsets are mostly PARTIAL so I cannot prove each pair's win is driven by the distinct axis I assigned rather than a single shared structural requirement.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient buckets reward each partial-prefix language-tag step closer to producing the default script, preserving near-match inputs as corpus so old_tag is incrementally steered to HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_SCRIPT.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP gradient walks partial language-tag bytes toward default-script constant

analysis.summary_one_line: Reaching the false side needs a valid font/table structure plus a script-language subtag whose old-tag lookup returns the default script, requiring both I2S substitution and CMP_MAP gradient.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A script/language subtag string whose old-script-tag lookup (hb_ot_old_tag_from_script) returns HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_SCRIPT, i.e. a near-match language tag refined byte-by-byte toward a value that makes old_tag equal the default.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry language-like subtags ('uu-hans', '-u-hans') in the tail, the product of incremental gradient refinement; cmplog's I2S alone cannot climb such a multi-byte similarity gradient, but value_profile's CMP_MAP rewards each byte that brings the lookup operands closer.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog lacks the CMP_MAP gradient, so it gets no intermediate credit for partial-prefix language tags and cannot iteratively steer old_tag toward the default; it blocks 8/10 with no preserved gradient stepping stones.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile/vpc CMP_MAP gradient buckets reward inputs whose CMP operands are closer to matching, preserving partial-prefix language tags as corpus so the lookup is incrementally steered to return the default script tag.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked false side is taken only when old_tag equals the default script tag at line 174.
value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 while value_profile blocks 8/10, the I2S-delta pair.
